# Kyle Semple Portfolio — LLM Companion Index

This file is a crawler-readable companion to the React app. It highlights stable non-JS discovery paths and markdown mirrors.

## About Kyle Semple
Kyle Semple is a **Forward Deployed Engineer**. He helps teams turn complex technical, operational, and spatial problems into systems people can understand, adopt, and use. His work connects forward-deployed engineering, technical implementation, customer success (as an evidence layer, not a managed book of business), solutions/systems architecture, GIS/spatial systems, operations, and AI workflow design.

Role-relevance lenses (forward-deployed engineering, solutions/systems architecture, GIS/spatial systems) are supporting metadata on a single thesis — not separate identities.

## Static discovery pages
- /ai-index
- /ai-index.html
- /site-index
- /site-index.html
